summary: Strategic initiative — AI SDR into GHL
actionItem: AI SDR integration into GHL — chat with Joey tomorrow to scope this. Janelle doesn't have bandwidth for GHL setup; Joey has a support team that can handle it. Align on who owns what before any build starts.

summary: Strategic initiative — Ops Tower team access
actionItem: Ops Tower team access — architect multi-user consulting warehouse (McKinsey/Deloitte model): role-based views, shared project history, how-we-solved-it knowledge base. Define who gets access and what they see.

summary: Strategic initiative — Karbon replacement (mgmt view first)
actionItem: Karbon replacement — build mgmt team view first (Janelle + Rick + Zack): capacity tracker, completed closes pipeline, and active pipeline. Replace Karbon for the 3 of you before expanding to full team.

summary: SealX financing — collect team personal info via secure form
actionItem: Collect SealX team personal info for financing: Full Name, SSN, DOB, Home Address (City/State/Zip). Options: (1) DocuSign — we already have it, fully compliant for SSNs, preferred; (2) JotForm HIPAA tier if DocuSign is awkward for a plain data-collection form. Rick drafted the ask — just build the form and send each person a secure link.
